probes.name: transfer-registry-warm
probes.description: EntityRegistry loaded from #[Importable] / #[Exportable] / #[SampleData] discovery on ApplicationBooted.

probes.name: transfer-storage-writable
probes.description: Round-trip write / read / delete on the configured artifact disks (source / result / errors).

probes.name: transfer-queue-workers-fresh
probes.description: At least one xfer_job reached succeeded / partially_succeeded within the last N hours. Warns when transfer queue workers are stalled fleet-wide.

probes.name: transfer-stalled-jobs
probes.description: No xfer_job in running with last_progress_at > stale threshold. Signals worker crash / stuck chunks.

probes.name: transfer-artifact-disk-usage
probes.description: Artifact disk usage below cap. Alerts when retention scans are behind.

probes.name: transfer-registry-drift
probes.description: Compares in-memory EntityRegistry hash with the cached hash. Non-zero drift means a deploy left the cache behind — hourly refresh should catch it.
